title: Runtime Sanitizers, Dynamic Analysis, and Language Profiles · Gate Lens: Thread Memory Sanitizers
summary: Add runtime instrumentation to native and managed-language test profiles. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates thread memory sanitizers increment in a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select thread, memory, leak, race, or platform sanitizers according to risk and compatibility.
Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer with appropriate recover or trap policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
